meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancer Guide: Solve 'No Portfolio' with Antigravity
content.seo_description: Overcome the 'no portfolio' trap using the Antigravity project template and Claude Code. A high-impact, intermediate guide for freelance developers to ship fast.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap is a bottleneck, not a dead end. Use the Antigravity project template to rapidly scaffold production-grade SaaS features. By pairing this with Claude Code, you automate the heavy lifting, allowing you to ship a high-fidelity, client-ready prototype in hours, not weeks, effectively bypassing the experience gap.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank screen, the silence of your repository echoing the fear that no client will trust your skills without a track record. The 'no portfolio' trap is the ultimate paradox of the freelance world: you need work to get work, but you need proof to get the work. It’s a vicious cycle that keeps talented developers in the wings while projects go to those with better marketing, not necessarily better code.

But the game has changed. With the Antigravity project template, you stop building from scratch and start orchestrating sophisticated, high-performance architectures. By leveraging AI-assisted workflows, you can manifest a polished, enterprise-grade portfolio piece that demonstrates technical maturity and architectural foresight, instantly shifting the power dynamic in your next client discovery call.

steps.title: Bootstrap the Architecture
steps.description: Initialize your project using the Antigravity template to ensure industry-standard folder structures and type-safety from line one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new project using the Antigravity template with support for Next.js, Tailwind, and Supabase integration.

steps.title: Define the Business Logic
steps.description: Use Claude Code to map out the core features of your portfolio project based on a real-world client requirement scenario.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a service layer that handles user authentication and a CRUD module for a subscription-based dashboard.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "generate service layer and CRUD boilerplate for subscription logic"

steps.title: Implement High-Fidelity UI
steps.description: Apply the Antigravity styling conventions to ensure your UI looks professional and consistent across all breakpoints.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a responsive dashboard layout using the Antigravity component library, focusing on clean typography and spacing.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "style dashboard components per Antigravity design system specs"

steps.title: Automate Unit Testing
steps.description: Security and reliability are the hallmarks of a pro. Automate test suites to prove your code is production-ready.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write unit tests for the auth and billing services to achieve 90% coverage.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "generate vitest suites for auth and billing services"

steps.title: Final Polish & Deployment
steps.description: Prepare your code for the final showcase by optimizing performance and cleaning up implementation details.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a code review and refactor for performance optimizations, then prepare the deployment script.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "review code for performance, add deployment CI/CD config"

pro_tips: Treat your portfolio project as a living SaaS; include a 'Help' or 'Documentation' page to show you understand user onboarding.
Use Claude Code to generate a 'Technical README' that explains your design decisions—clients hire architects, not just coders.
Always deploy to a live URL; a GitHub link is good, but a live demo is 10x more persuasive.
Incorporate a mock API or data visualization to prove you can handle complex state management.
Focus on one niche (e.g., FinTech or HealthTech) for your portfolio project to become a specialist rather than a generalist.
content.next_steps: Once your project is live, record a 60-second Loom video walkthrough of the app. Send this video alongside your proposal to potential clients to demonstrate communication skills and technical mastery.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the 'perfect' client to find you. Build the evidence you need to command higher rates and land premium contracts. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
